elements.title: land reclamation in Macau
elements.contents: ... that land reclamation in Macau (map pictured) has increased available land threefold?

elements.title: Jenna Meek
elements.contents: ... that Jenna Meek once decorated Love Island contestants with glitter?

elements.title: Pokémon Uranium
elements.contents: ... that the fan-made Pokémon games Pokémon Uranium and Pokémon Prism were in development for nine and eight years respectively?

elements.title: Kenneth Chen
elements.contents: ... that Kenneth Chen joked about contesting the 1988 Singaporean general election—then actually did?

elements.title: Chatô, o Rei do Brasil
elements.contents: ... that the film Chatô, o Rei do Brasil took twenty years to be released due to a scandal involving the mismanagement of public funds?

elements.title: Ivor Wynne
elements.contents: ... that a professional football stadium was named after Ivor Wynne, even though he was known for amateur sports?

elements.title: a popular song has been used
elements.contents: ... that a popular song has been used by Apple, the White House, an MLB stadium, and a Disney film?

elements.title: Shinichi Fukuda
elements.contents: ... that Shinichi Fukuda spent thirteen hours watching the first two episodes of her manga My Dress-Up Darling's adaptation on repeat?

elements.title: George Washington
elements.contents: ... that George Washington is an American in Paris?
